'''Saffalore''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> at one end of the [[Lucaya Cross]]. It was one of the Sector's most recent boomworlds.<ref name="TEA" />

Saffalore's surface was largely covered by hard, uncultivated ground with sickly green grass, hills, and forests. The headquarters of [[Binring Biomedical Product]] was located there.<ref name="TCSWE" /> Other successful corporations with impressive stock performance were also headquartered there.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
